text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I head to the library to do some<n>research, when...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This book must have it... It's the<n>official study
guide for the exams after<n>all...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, here it is. Okay, now to...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, it is superstring theory...However, I have no way to test it...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Looks like Tachyon is also studying<n>for the test.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are all those books hers?<n>That's so much
reading for one<n>person.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, they don't call her a genius for<n>nothing. But
I'm no one to sneeze at<n>either!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet's stack of finished<n>books grows
and grows, as if she's<n>competing with Agnes
Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I can't keep my eyes open... And<n>my head
feels like it's going to<n>explode...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon's pile is up to the ceiling, yet<n>she looks
completely fine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Mine is barely past my head and I'm<n>already
tired... How embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, I see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Type 0 string theory, huh? How<n>curious.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh. Tachyon already left.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And she didn't even put back her<n>books? Looks
like I'll have to do it, I<n>guess.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Current Status of Unified FieldTheory and QuantumEntanglement and Observation... And this one's Applications ofQuantum Field Theory?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There's no way any of these will be<n>on the test...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And here I got all workedup for nothing. I really need to stop—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oops... I knocked them over. I need to<n>tidy this
mess up...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. What the heck are all these<n>formulas? Are
these even words?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't make heads or tails of any of<n>this. I can't
believe she reads such<n>difficult stuff.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's not on the test, the fact<n>that she can
read books and books of<n>it is...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I can't get left behind! I need<n>to study
even more!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet goes back to studying,<n>devouring
more study guides and<n>reference books until
just before<n>closing time.
